creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Colin Percival from comment #1)

Ah! Thanks. 

My bad. I went by <https://www.freebsd.org/security/#model> alone (the penultimate paragraph) without digging further into <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-announce/2015-February/001624.html> (which I did read, albeit years ago … its significance was forgotten, sorry). 

So, the patch is obsolete (and close this report, if you like, it's premature).
